response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified two main segments: a waiting screen/intro and a performance section.
2. Detected the song title "HELP!!" and artist "natori" from the on-screen text.
3. Searched for "HELP!!" natori Japanese and English lyrics.
4. Confirmed it's a song by natori featuring Kobo Kanaeru.
5. Extracted the lyrics from the search results to populate the JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Kobo Kanaeru on a beach setting, followed by her performing an acoustic cover of the song "HELP!!" (originally by natori featuring Kobo Kanaeru).

scenes.description: Waiting screen for Kobo's 3rd Anniversary stream with chat on the right side.
Kobo Kanaeru standing on a beach, talking to the audience.
Kobo Kanaeru singing "HELP!!" while playing the acoustic guitar. Text "Lyrics: natori Kobo Kanaeru Music: natori" is displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hiding like a star, focus is off
The angel is no longer in this room
I meet eyes with someone I don't know, these days
Using something as a guide, the gears start to move

I pierce my ears, something untrusting
Begging for something
Night is coming, someone's whisper
Heart that ends, what a secret

I can't live like this
Nothing fills me
I can't live like this
Nothing fills me, I want to change
